title: Section 508 baseline mapping
description: Section 508 web testing generally maps to WCAG 2.0/2.1 Level A and AA criteria for web content.
testMethod: Use static findings mapped to WCAG criteria as Section 508 evidence where applicable.
remediationGuidance: Use ICT Testing Baseline procedures and manual validation to confirm Section 508 conformance.

title: Controls must expose name, role, and value
description: Interactive controls need programmatically determinable names, roles, and values.
testMethod: Map static name/role/value findings to Section 508 baseline review.
remediationGuidance: Provide native semantic elements and accessible names; verify with assistive technology.

title: Keyboard operation requires manual validation
description: Static scanning can flag risk indicators, but cannot prove all functionality is keyboard operable.
testMethod: Manual keyboard testing is required for workflows and custom controls.
remediationGuidance: Validate all functionality with keyboard only, including focus order, visible focus, traps, and custom widgets.
